  • Description:
    - Update Code Base. - Improve system stability when switching to CSM mode. - CPU uCode version 0x123 was updated for CPU performance optimization by disabling the CEP function for the 14th Gen CPU (stepping B0). - ME Firmware ver: ME_16.1.30.2361 (download) - ME Firmware update SOP
